Translations.15428: [15428]Oh hello there! Welcome to Cornelius Richling's Real Estate Emporium! I am Cornelius, owner, founder and occasional brochure model at your service! I can see by your rakish good looks that you're in the market for a premium property, am I right?
Translations.15429: [15429]Now buddy, there are just a few small formalities to dispense with before we can go castle shopping! I'm referring naturally, to my retainer, singing fee, and performance bonus!
Translations.15430: [15430]Don't worry, chum, there's no better investment than in one's own future!
Translations.15431: [15431]Now sir, I?ll tell you, there?s nothing sub-prime about THIS market. These luxurious, sky-high habitats are being snatched up by all the finest people. And you?re better than them, am I right?
Translations.15432: [15432]Take a look at these fine specimens. Why not take a tour? I extort...ahem, I EXHORT you to wander around. Remember, you'll be able to customize all you want, later.
Translations.15433: [15433]Ah, the Evening model. Her charms are a thinly veiled mystery. What lies beneath the veil you ask? Why it just might be your gold! Those midnight hues are sure to bring out the green in your neighbors.
Translations.15434: [15434]Oh, the Dusky model. Her tawny charms evoke the last fleeting glow of sunset. Perfect for feeding your uninvited guests a meal that is best served cold, and I don?t mean Gazpacho. Pairs well with a pool of acid.
Translations.15435: [15435]Yes, the Foggy model, Cool, hazy and more than a little foreboding. Nothing says ?Don?t come in here and take my gold while I?m out stealing yours? like a rich and murky smog; that, and flamethrowers can?t hurt.
Translations.15436: [15436]A fine choice! This specimen belongs to a former scum ahem, CLIENT of mine. Observe the open concept dungeon, and acres of counter space! Unfortunately, it's a smidge out of your range. You won the lottery, not a BANK BAILOUT!
Translations.15437: [15437]Despair not my chintzy I mean, frugal friend. Build up and improve your castle and one day you too will be the envy of the world! Just not today.
Translations.15438: [15438]Excellent choice! One final signature and this fabulous castle will be yours and you, the envy of your neighbors, low-class louts that they are. Nice people, I'm told.
Translations.15439: [15439]Welcome to your castle! This is it, your fortress, your home, and your ticket to immortality!
Translations.15440: [15440]Welcome to your castle! Walk around; take it in. This spacious, no bedroom, no bathroom, no front-lawn castle has EVERYTHING! Oh! Watch your step! Yes, that IS rubble.
Translations.15441: [15441]Come on Buddy! Let?s not dwell in the past. What do you say we start fixing 'er up?
Translations.15442: [15442]Worried about where you can get the gold you need? I can dig it. No really, let?s dig it up!
Translations.15443: [15443]Installing a gold mine is easy as can be, plus it looks cool! Just remember: you'll need to be extra-careful to protect it.
Translations.15444: [15444]Where might you find a purveyor of such venerable wares, you ask? I think I know just the person. Me! Step into my shop, a side business really, let me buzz you in.
Translations.15445: [15445]Good work! The money train has left the station!
Translations.15446: [15446]Mm, Life force. Doesn?t that sound healthy? You'll need it to create almost everything in this castle! Let's build a LIFE FORCE MINE. I sell the parts; you bring the money.
Translations.15448: [15448]Excellent! You now have everything you need to start accumulating wealth.
Translations.15449: [15449]You wouldn't want an invader to come and steal your hard stolen cash, now would you?
Translations.15450: [15450]First, barricades. Or as they say in Sweden, bookshelves! These impossible-to-assemble units looked great in the showroom and now they?ll be great for confounding intruders. They're in my shop.
Translations.15451: [15451]Hmm, starting to look homely, uh HOMEY, don't you think? I like what you're doing with the flow.
Translations.15452: [15452]Now, you'll want to fill this place with creatures to keep unwanted pillagers away. Positively repellent they are, and I do mean the smell. Look in the Defense section of my shop.
Translations.15453: [15453]Good work, proud parent, your castle has taken its first step towards impregnability!
Translations.15454: [15454]Don't forget to install additional creatures later on, once you've beefed the place up.
Translations.15455: [15455]Ok, now we'll visit the very heart of your castle, named conveniently, the Castle Heart. Clever, don't you think?
Translations.15456: [15456]This is your CASTLE HEART. It's really important! It's the source of your home's general airborn-edness, not to mention its main power supplier.
Translations.15457: [15457]Upgrading the heart is the first step if you want to improve anything else, and also what makes your castle increase in level!
Translations.15458: [15458]Got that congested, clogged and over-crowded feeling? You?ll have to upgrade the Castle Heart in order to expand and to make room for more creatures.
Translations.15459: [15459]Did you know that all your creatures automatically increase in power with Castle Heart upgrades? Or that your Defense points go up as well? It?s in the fine print.
Translations.15460: [15460]Look at that! Now that you?ve upgraded the Castle Heart, you?ve gained access to your very own Architect?s office. What?s that good for, you ask? Well buddy...
Translations.15461: [15461]Been gazing out the back garret and wondering about an extension? Now's the time! Let's make room for more creatures and traps. All the better to guard your gold!
Translations.15462: [15462]Oh dear! I see you are looking a little light in the wallet, my friend! Tsk tsk, those lottery winnings just don't stretch as far as they used to!
Translations.15463: [15463]It seems we need more resources than we can acquire via "Conventional Means" It?s time to find one of those, what-do-you-call-its? Flunky? Stooge? Nonono. HERO! Yes! We need a HERO to work for us.
Translations.15464: [15464]Your hero is someone you'll dispatch to shall we say, gather resources? Oh you know, pop by the neighbor and borrow a cup of money, that kind of thing. Except not borrow.
Translations.15465: [15465]Now, hire a hero, but choose wisely. These malefactors, I mean, HEROES, don't come cheap, usually.
Translations.15466: [15466]But since we are PARTNERS, and I hope you think of me as much more; I am willing to let you hire one at no extra cost. That?s just the kind of guy I am; one with hidden agendas.
Translations.15467: [15467]That is a fine choice. Now, Let's send your hero on a little errand to ?liberate? some urgently needed life force.
Translations.15499: [15499]But hold up! Before we do that, he?s going to need something to defend himself with.
Translations.15468: [15468]Behold Opulencia! Vast empire of other-people?s riches! Now, the sooner that bumbling, I mean VALIANT hero gets out there, the sooner those riches will be yours.
Translations.15469: [15469]My my, look at you! Your hero handled that castle like a real professional castle-handler. They have a word for hunks like you: fierce! Simply fierce.
Translations.15470: [15470]However we're going to need to beef up your hero?s skill-set a little bit before we send him into the big show.
Translations.15471: [15471]Great!  Oh, don?t worry, Your lunkhead um, Hero will get used to that skill soon enough.
Translations.15472: [15472]Now that your good-for-something-after-all hero has brought home the bacon, let's add that room he robbed your neighbors in order for you to afford. A visit to the Architect is in order.
Translations.15473: [15473]Wonderful! This place is taking shape. Say! Buddy, we could flip this property right now, why my commission alone would be... Oh but what am I saying? Let's protect this property.
Translations.15474: [15474]One of the sweetest deals in passive home security are traps! Now, these aren't your Mummy's traps no siree! Haha! Actually they are. Your Mummy makes great traps. They're in my shop.
Translations.15475: [15475]You'll need to add a generator to activate your shiny new traps, so go ahead and place one now!  I needn?t remind you that my emporium carries a full selection.
Translations.15476: [15476]Now that you have that trap hooked up I suggest you set out to acquire some new resources.
Translations.15477: [15477]In Opulencia attacking your neighbors is just well, neighborly.
Translations.15501: [15501]Now's the perfect time to let your hero try out that new skill, especially since he seems to have mastered that idle.
Translations.15478: [15478]Look at you! You?re really getting the hang of this. Keep building up your castle?s defenses and appropriating your neighbors' resources until your castle is full again.
Translations.15479: [15479]One more highly important piece of info: Opulencian property law is very strict and stipulates that 'he who deals it; feels it'.
Translations.15480: [15480]This means you need to complete your own castle before you let anyone else in to try their luck. It also gets your mines going, which is nice.
Translations.15481: [15481]Beautiful! We're in business now! Did I mention that if another hero successfully loots your castle, you'll lose a portion of your treasure? Make sure you keep those defenses strong!
Translations.15482: [15482]Dear me, you?re not having some kind of attack, are you? Well you should be! Everyone?s doing it. Now hit it.
Translations.15483: [15483]Player created castles contain plenty of gold and life force but are also the only place to obtain special rewards! More on that later.
Translations.15484: [15484]Ok pal, it?s Robin Hood time again! Just look around your hood and start robbin it!
Translations.15485: [15485]Hear ye! Hear ye! Prepare your earholes for the following message from the God of Goo, the King of Crud, The Right Honorable Count Snottingham. His eminent snotulousness berates you thusly, ahem; "Worthless and repugnant pretender, your feeble and cack-handed left-clicking presents itself not merely as the desperate fumbling of an amateur, but that of a deeply rancid and pitiful ugly-person.
Translations.15486: [15486]To say that your existence in MY KINGDOM is an annoyance, is to at once exaggerate the microscopic impact of your arrival and to understate my disgust. I bought HEPA filters that I was told were SPECIFICALLY DESIGNED to keep scum like you out. Damn you Cornelius!
Translations.15487: [15487]If you have designs on my kingdom, you had better bring more to the fight than the bad manners and fish-breath for which you've already made a name for yourself amongst the craven wretches that clean the feet of my FEET-CLEANERS. That is all.
Translations.15488: [15488]Wow, you must have really gotten under his skin, and that's not a very pleasant place to be! You're not gonna take that, are you?
Translations.15489: [15489]Well if you're going to go to war against Snottingham, you'd better get to it!
Translations.15490: [15490]Now the only thing that stands between you and a fortune in gold is a lifetime of thankless hard work. I?m kidding! Just get out there and steal it!
Translations.15491: [15491]A hearty congratulations my friend. An UPGRADED heart that is. You have just earned access to the Potion Brewery.
Translations.15492: [15492]With your castle perking up, we can't have tatty looking heroes hanging around can we? Wanna get some better gear? I'll show you how to do so.
Translations.15493: [15493]Here's the blacksmith, who you can visit to craft brand new items. He'll set you up.
Translations.15494: [15494]Well done. You've been granted access to the Crafting Lab. With it and the Materials you've collected, you'll be able to craft powerful creatures and traps, not to mention Shell Art!
Translations.15495: [15495]Remember when I told you that some castles contain special items? Well they do! All I can say now is that they can be used to create powerful stuff.
Translations.15502: [15502]Ooh! You'll want to hold on to that. It's incredibly important and you're lucky to have it. Why? Not tellin'. I love suspense.

Translations.16463: [16463]Oh hello there! Welcome to Cornelius Richling's Real Estate Emporium! I am Cornelius, owner, founder and occasional brochure model at your service!
Translations.16464: [16464]Now buddy, I can see by your rakish good looks and winning lottery ticket, that you're in the market for a premium property, am I right? Why don't we take a look at some my offerings.
Translations.16465: [16465]Now sir, there?s nothing sub-prime about THIS market. These luxurious, sky-high habitats are being snatched up by all the finest people. And you?re better than them, am I right?
Translations.16466: [16466]Take a look at this fine specimen. We're having an OPEN HOUSE. Why not take a tour? I extort...ahem, I EXHORT you to wander around.
Translations.16467: [16467]You see? Welcoming, yet still manages to incinerate your enemies. You'll be able to modify and arrange it however you like. For you my friend, the sky's no longer the limit!
Translations.16468: [16468]Isn't it lovely? It belongs to a former scum ahem, CLIENT of mine. Now why don't you just hand that lottery ticket over so?
Translations.16469: [16469]Oh buddy? Unfortunately, this castle's a smidge out of your range. The Opulencian exchange rate you see is quite volatile and well, you won the lottery, not a BANK BAILOUT!
Translations.16470: [16470]But hold on! I have the PERFECT fixer-upper opportunity for a miser? ah, WISE shopper such as yourself!
Translations.16472: [16472]Despair not my frugal friend. I will personally help you build and improve your castle. One day you will be the envy of Opulencia! Just not today.
Translations.16473: [16473]Go on, give your castle a name. It's how your neighbors will know you.
Translations.16474: [16474]Congratulations! Welcome to your ? land! This is it, your property, your home, your floating bit of rock IN THE SKY!
Translations.16475: [16475]Now for the next essential of life in Opulencia; your hero. Now, choose wisely. This zero, I mean, HERO, will be the one to help you build your castle.
Translations.16477: [16477]That is a fine choice. Now let's get this layabout busy clearing your land. Only then can you begin building on it.
Translations.16478: [16478]Great! You're ready to start building! For each stage you'll need to gather the necessary materials. And for that, you'll need to send your hero out to "visit" another castle.
Translations.16479: [16479]Opulencia! Vast empire of other people's riches. This backwater, eh REGION is called Little Spitaly and is ruled by Count Snottingham. It's where you'll begin your castle attacking career.
Translations.16480: [16480]But before you send your hero out, let's have a look at the stuff you picked up while cleaning up your land.
Translations.16481: [16481]And if you ever find yourself missing anything, this is my shop. It's always open and available for whatever your hero needs.
Translations.16482: [16482]Since this is your first castle attack, let's take it easy. This one is abandoned and should be a cinch. Now, let's give your hero some "on the ROB" training.
Translations.16483: [16483]My my, look at you! Your hero handled that castle like a real professional castle-handler. They have a word for hunks like you: fierce! Simply fierce.
Translations.16484: [16484]Now we're gonna need to beef up your hero?s skill-set a little bit before we send him into the big show.
Translations.16485: [16485]Oh! Looks like word of your handiwork is getting around. Look! There's an opportunity to test you hero's skill and earn some rewards which can help you build your castle.
Translations.16487: [16487]Hello there! I?m Fendrick, humble peasant farmer and might I impose upon you with an errand? A trifling affair really, you see, my brother has fallen upon a spot of bad luck.
Translations.16488: [16488]His farm?s been overrun by an invasive species of chicken, horrid things, Welsh I believe.
Translations.16489: [16489]Anyway. Tybalt's too poor AND TOO PROUD to ask but if you help him out I?ll I mean, WE'LL be very grateful.
Translations.16491: [16491]There you are! I saw what you did over at the Tybalt farm. I like your style. Ol? Tybalt might differ, but well, all?s fair in love and Opulencia!
Translations.16492: [16492]Now that you?ve had a bit of practice, why not try raiding a REAL castle? Come on! Isn?t that what you?re really here for?
Translations.16493: [16493]Have a look at this one; I?ve heard it?s a bit of a pushover. You know, new arrivals, pay more attention to the high ceilings than to security.
Translations.16494: [16494]Try it out! See if you can get all the way through it without, what's the word?? Dying.
Translations.16496: [16496]OI! It is you! Scoundrel! Murderer! Nasty idiot person! You destroyed all my beautiful chickens. I knew some of those birds since they were eggs!
Translations.16497: [16497]Fendrick?s not my brother you wit that is only half of a normal persons! He?s an evil wizard agribusiness tycoon.
Translations.16498: [16498]It?s his evil GMO chicken zombies that must be destroyed. He hates my natural free-range chickadees AND free market competition.
Translations.16499: [16499]Now avenge my flock. Destroy the wizard chicken and his zombie horde.
Translations.16501: [16501]Buddy, I like the cut of your jib! In fact, I like everything about your jib.
Translations.16502: [16502]I?ve got a very special job for you and for it you're going to need a partner. A very particular kind of character is needed for this job.
Translations.16503: [16503]He's been AWOL for some time, not that I've minded. He was last seen making medical supply deliveries to this castle here. What they need so many probes for I?ll never know.
Translations.16504: [16504]Come see me when you two are ready for a very lucrative proposition.
Translations.16506: [16506]Buddy! ?Nigel. You guys make quite a team! This next job is going to be a BREEZE! and no Nigel, that is NOT an excuse to break wind.
Translations.16507: [16507]What you will break is the BANK! Illegal? Pfft! frankly, it's their service charges that are the real crime here.
Translations.16508: [16508]Pay them a visit and make a withdrawal of say, everything.
Translations.16510: [16510]Assassin! Product of a genetically inferior ugly people. Yeah you! No I still haven't forgiven you. Fendrick is up to his fiendish plots again.
Translations.16511: [16511]He builds rock sculptures that he calls Totems. They are some kind of magic, and tastelessly derivative. They nourish and control his creatures.
Translations.16512: [16512]Soon, they will be all over Opulencia! You must get to his castle and destroy these objectionable objects.
Translations.16514: [16514]Ok partner, I see you?ve got just the mercenary attitude that is going to take you far in Opulencia. I like that.
Translations.16515: [16515]Now I happen to be in possession of information regarding a certain secret cache of merchandise and friend, it's there for the taking!
Translations.16516: [16516]It's inside that castle right there and behind something called Hot Rollers. What are those you ask? I dunno but that's what they'll be calling us after this job.
Translations.16518: [16518]Ok my brother. I can call you that now right? There?s really no one I'd rather share a tanning bed with you know.
Translations.16519: [16519]Now, something you ought to know. That bank we robbed? That was Count Snottingham's bank, the snotty boss of this region. I suspect he?s pouring our concrete underpants at this very moment.
Translations.16520: [16520]But don't worry about that because we are going to knock out his pathetic snotter army before he gets the chance. He?ll never know what hit him.
Translations.16521: [16521]I happen to know for a fact that most of his henchmen hang out at his ex-wife's castle. She?s got a pool boy thing going with the lot of them.
Translations.16522: [16522]Come on! Let's get the jump on them and clean house while we?re at it!
Translations.16524: [16524]Buddy! I see you and Nigel are really becoming tight. No accounting for taste.
Translations.16525: [16525]Now I really do have a simple matter for you. I have this castle I want to flip, but wouldn't you know it, squatters have taken up residence.
Translations.16526: [16526]I just need you to clear them out and clean the place up a bit.
Translations.16528: [16528]You know what partner? You and I are bigger than this tutorial backwater. Who is does this Snottingham think he is anyway?
Translations.16529: [16529]This too-big-for-his-pants little Caesar is giving amphibians a bad name.
Translations.16530: [16530]Come on partner! He ain't the boss of us!

Translations.16584: [16584]Buddy! ?Nigel. This next job is going to be a BREEZE! and no Nigel that is NOT an excuse to break wind. What you will break is the BANK! Illegal? Pfft! frankly, their service charges are the real crime here.
Translations.16586: [16586]Fendrick is up to his fiendish plots again. This time it's Totems, a kind of magic, and tastelessly derivative. They nourish and control his creatures. Get to his castle and destroy these objectionable objects.
Translations.16588: [16588]I like that mercenary attitude of yours. Now, I know of a secret cache of merchandise that's there for the taking! There! Behind something called Hot Rollers. And that's what they'll be calling us, after this job.
Translations.16591: [16591]Remember that bank? It was Count Snottingham's bank. He's angry now. But I know his henchmen hang out at his ex-wife's castle. Pool boy thing, don't ask. Let's get the jump on them there before they get us!
Translations.16593: [16593]Buddy! I see you and Nigel are really becoming tight. No accounting for taste. Now I have this castle I want to flip, but wouldn't you know it, squatters have taken up residence. I need you to clear them out.
Translations.16595: [16595]Me and you partner are bigger than this tutorial backwater. Who is does this Snottingham think he is anyway? That little Snot Tzar is giving amphibians a bad name. Come on partner! He ain't the boss of us!
Translations.16597: [16597]You did it! You've unlocked your castle! Visit it now and start making improvements!
